---
title: "Modelling Exercise 1"
subtitle: "Let's try to model a simple dataset"
---

## Model This Dataset

You want to model the following dataset.

| person | birth_place | birth_date | lives_in | works_as
|------|------|------|------|------|
| Alex | Ottawa, Ontario | 24 June 1974 | Toronto, Ontario | physician
| Billie | Lima, Peru | 10 April 1959 | Winnipeg, Manitoba | journalist
| Claude | Laval, Quebec | 3 October 1982 | Paris, France | researcher

### Question

Looking at [basic graph patterns](./graph-patterns.html), which ones would you use?

Write them down here: [https://app.sli.do/event/hJfrRAUyKwLfvD2VMPzyUc/live/polls](https://app.sli.do/event/hJfrRAUyKwLfvD2VMPzyUc/live/polls), preferably one at a time.
